name: @agentsoul/desktop-v2
description: AgentSoul v2 TypeScript/Tauri desktop companion and control center

scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && echo "Desktop Companion appearance view" && echo "Companion appearance view model" && echo "Desktop Companion interaction command flow" && echo "Desktop Companion approval flow" && echo "Desktop Companion risk notice flow" && echo "Control Center browser visual smoke" && echo "Control Center task navigation" && echo "Control Center Companion area" && echo "Control Center Gateway and Costs areas" && echo "Control Center Skills area" && echo "Control Center Sessions area" && echo "Control Center Safety area" && echo "Control Center Settings area"
